comments.author: @TopTravelParadise
comments.text: Thank you for watching and joining us on this journey. If you enjoyed the video, please like, subscribe, share it with others, and leave your thoughts in the comments below. Your feedback and support help us continue creating high-quality content. We truly appreciate you being here, and we look forward to seeing you in our next adventure

replies.author: @TopTravelParadise
replies.text: The ancient city of Babylon is located in modern-day central-southern Iraq, about 85 kilometers (53 miles) south of Baghdad and near the modern city of Hillah. Situated on the lower Euphrates River, it is a designated UNESCO World Heritage Site.
